title: Swift (disambiguation)
content:
'''Swift''' can refer to:
*'''[[Clawswift]]'''

*'''''[[Swift (freighter)|Swift]]''''', a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]].

*'''[[Mercurial Swift]]''', a [[bounty hunter]].
